# Eftelya Çelik

> Computer Engineer building bridges between design and code — a portfolio of full-stack web, AI/LLM, and data science projects.

Eftelya Çelik is a Computer Engineer based in Istanbul, Turkey, working across full-stack web development, AI/LLM systems (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and machine learning / data science. This site showcases her project portfolio and contact details. Languages: English, Türkçe.

## Projects
- [Akdeniz Smart Assistant](/work/ai-document-chatbot): AI-powered document chat platform for Akdeniz University — a .NET (ASP.NET Core) orchestration service plus a FastAPI AI microservice, RAG over document embeddings with pgvector then Qdrant, and a self-hosted Qwen LLM.
- [LLM-Based RAG Workflow — TÜBİTAK](/work/llm-rag-tubitak): Large language model and Retrieval-Augmented Generation system for TÜBİTAK research use cases.
- [Retail Sales Prediction](/work/retail-sales-prediction): Retail sales forecasting model built with the XGBoost machine learning algorithm.
- [Akdeniz Career Summit 2025](/work/akdeniz-career-summit-2025): Organized a large-scale career summit with 500+ registrations and shipped the official website.
- [Günkaf 25 Website](/work/gunkaf-25-website): WordPress website development and maintenance for the Günkaf 25 organization at Akdeniz University.

## Pages
